reviews.comment:
Excelente personal, muy atentos. Lástima la concesión del ACA, malos horarios de la parte comercial y baños. Soy socio del ACA hace varios años y sus servicios, incluso en Ushuaia,  son muy buenos. Pero en un lugar tan especial como este, quizá se deba ser mas cuidadoso.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent staff, very attentive. It's a shame about the ACA concession; the opening hours for the commercial area and the restrooms are inconvenient. I've been an ACA member for several years, and their services, even in Ushuaia, are very good. But in a place as special as this, perhaps they should be more careful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdHBfRXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cada vez atienden peor, entiendo que están saturados pero pongan más empleados o modifiquen el sistema, los que pagan con tarjeta que lo hagan en la oficina y retirando el vehículo del surtidor
Realmente muy lento

(Translated by Google)
The service is getting worse and worse. I understand they're overwhelmed, but they should hire more staff or change the system. Those paying by card should pay at the office and then remove their vehicle from the pump. It's incredibly slow.
